name: Pesto with Jalapeno
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the pine nuts, garlic, and jalapeno in a food processor; process for 30 seconds.
2. Add the parsley, basil, and olive oil; pulse briefly to mix the greens into the oil.
3. Process until the mixture is finely pureed.
Yield: About 1 cup.
Adapted from Jacques Pepin, "The (Louisville, KY) Courier-Journal". July 22, 1990.
